description_long: This house features a broad, low-pitched gable roof with brown shingles and several skylights, giving it a modern yet practical appearance. The exterior walls are primarily composed of red brick, with large glass windows and sliding doors on the rear and side facades, allowing for ample natural light. The front entryway is sheltered by a modest overhang supported by two yellow columns, and is flanked by two sets of windows. The rear of the house boasts a spacious balcony with glass railings, accessible through wide sliding doors, and additional skylights are visible on the roof. The overall structure is rectangular with a strong horizontal emphasis, and the window arrangement is asymmetrical, with larger openings on the rear and side. The house appears to be a single-family residence, designed for comfort and openness in an urban or suburban setting.
description: A modern, single-family house with a wide gable roof, red brick walls, large glass windows, and a rear balcony. The design features skylights, a sheltered front entry, and an open, airy layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with an overhang, two yellow columns, and symmetrical windows on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large gable roof, multiple skylights, and the rear balcony with glass railings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying expansive sliding glass doors and windows, with the roof extending over the back.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the balcony, glass railings, and the asymmetrical window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Sheltered entry with overhang, two yellow columns, and double doors flanked by windows
